attributes.Sql Query:
select 
SPTA.TFINV	as	BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_NUM    
,SPTA.TFIDTE	as	BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_DT     
,SPTA.TFNPAS	as	BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_PSNGR_NUM_INT
,SPTA.TFACBR	as	BK_AMX_TRVL_INV_ACTG_BRNCH_NUM
,SPTA.TFMCID	as	BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_MACHINE_ID   
,SPTA.TFSEQN	as	BK_INVOICE_SEGMENT_SEQ_NUM_INT
,case when SPTA.TFAORR='A' then SPTA.TFCCDE else '=' end as RU_FLIGHT_SERVICE_CLASS_CD    
,case when SPTA.TFAORR='A' then COALESCE( NIAO.BK_IATA_AIRPORT_CD ,SPTA.TFFAPT,'-99' ) else '=' end  as	RU_FLIGHT_ORGN_IATA_AIRPORT_CD
,case when SPTA.TFAORR='A' then COALESCE( NIAD.BK_IATA_AIRPORT_CD ,SPTA.TFTAPT,'-99' ) else '=' end  as	RU_FLIGHT_DSTN_IATA_AIRPORT_CD
,case when SPTA.TFAORR='A' then COALESCE(  NIA.BK_IATA_AIRPORT_CD,EPTA.ORIGIN,'-99' )  else '=' end  as	RU_TRIP_ORGN_IATA_AIRPORT_CD  
,case when SPTA.TFAORR='A' then SPTA.TFCXR	else '=' end as 	RU_IATA_AIRLINE_CD            
,case when SPTA.TFAORR='A' then SPTA.TFFLNO	 else '=' end as	RU_FLIGHT_NUM                 
,case when SPTA.TFAORR='R' then SPTA.TFCCDE else '=' end as RU_RAIL_SERVICE_CLASS_CD      
,case when SPTA.TFAORR='R' then SPTA.TFCXR	else '=' end as RU_AMEX_RAIL_CARRIER_CD       
,case when SPTA.TFAORR='R' then COALESCE( NIRD.BK_RAIL_STATION_CD ,SPTA.TFTAPT,'-99' ) else '=' end as	RU_PASSAGE_DSTN_RAIL_STN_CD   
,case when SPTA.TFAORR='R' then COALESCE( NIRO.BK_RAIL_STATION_CD ,SPTA.TFFAPT,'-99' ) else '=' end as	RU_PASSAGE_ORGN_RAIL_STN_CD   
,case when SPTA.TFAORR='R' then COALESCE( NIR.BK_RAIL_STATION_CD,EPTA.ORIGIN,'-99' )   else '=' end as	RU_TRIP_ORIGIN_RAIL_STN_CD    
,case when SPTA.TFAORR='R' then SPTA.TFFLNO	 else '=' end as 	RU_TRAIN_NUM                  
,cast (  ( cast(SPTA.TFADTE as date format 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) ||' '|| cast(  case when substr( trim(SPTA.TFATME), char_length( trim(SPTA.TFATME) )) ='A' and  cast( substr( trim(SPTA.TFATME),1,2) as integer)  <>12
                                                                                 then  ( substr( trim(SPTA.TFATME),1,2)  ||':'||  substr( trim(SPTA.TFATME),3,2) ||':00'  )  
                         when  substr( trim(SPTA.TFATME), char_length( trim(SPTA.TFATME) )) ='A' and  cast( substr( trim(SPTA.TFATME),1,2) as integer)  = 12
                                       then  ( '00:'||  substr( trim(SPTA.TFATME),3,2) ||':00'  ) 
                         when  substr( trim(SPTA.TFATME), 5 ) ='P' and cast( substr( trim(SPTA.TFATME),1,2) as integer)  <> 12
                              then   trim(  ( 12+ cast( substr( trim(SPTA.TFATME),1,2) as integer) )    ||':'||  substr( trim(SPTA.TFATME),3,2) ||':00' )   
                         when  substr( trim(SPTA.TFATME), 5 ) ='P' and cast( substr( trim(SPTA.TFATME),1,2) as integer)  =  12
                              then   trim(  substr( trim(SPTA.TFATME),1,2)   ||':'||  substr( trim(SPTA.TFATME),3,2) ||':00' )   
   end  as char(15) )  ) as timestamp(0))  as	SEGMENT_ARRIVAL_DTM        
,cast (  ( cast(SPTA.TFDDTE as date format 'YYYY-MM-DD' )  ||' '|| cast(  case when substr( trim(SPTA.TFDTME), char_length( trim(SPTA.TFDTME) )) ='A' and  cast( substr( trim(SPTA.TFDTME),1,2) as integer)  <>12
                                                                                 then  ( substr( trim(SPTA.TFDTME),1,2)  ||':'||  substr( trim(SPTA.TFDTME),3,2) ||':00'  )  
                         when  substr( trim(SPTA.TFDTME), char_length( trim(SPTA.TFDTME) )) ='A' and  cast( substr( trim(SPTA.TFDTME),1,2) as integer)  = 12
                                       then  ( '00:'||  substr( trim(SPTA.TFDTME),3,2) ||':00'  ) 
                         when  substr( trim(SPTA.TFDTME), 5 ) ='P' and cast( substr( trim(SPTA.TFDTME),1,2) as integer)  <> 12
                              then   trim(  ( 12+ cast( substr( trim(SPTA.TFDTME),1,2) as integer) )    ||':'||  substr( trim(SPTA.TFDTME),3,2) ||':00' )   
                         when  substr( trim(SPTA.TFDTME), 5 ) ='P' and cast( substr( trim(SPTA.TFDTME),1,2) as integer)  =  12
                              then   trim(  substr( trim(SPTA.TFDTME),1,2)   ||':'||  substr( trim(SPTA.TFDTME),3,2) ||':00' )   
   end  as char(15) )  ) as timestamp(0))  as 	SEGMENT_DEPARTURE_DTM  
,SPTA.TFADTE	as	FLIGHT_ARRIVAL_DT             
,SPTA.TFDDTE	as	FLIGHT_DEPARTURE_DT           
,COALESCE( EPTA.CONNECTION_FLAG,'=') 	as	SEGMENT_CONNECTION_FLG        
,COALESCE( SPTA.TFEXRT,0)	as	REPORTED_CURRENCY_EXCHANGE_RT 
,COALESCE( SPTA.TFFCDI,'=')	as	SEGMENT_DOMESTIC_INTRNTNL_CD  
,COALESCE(SPTA.TFMILE,0)	as	SEGMENT_MILES_CNT             
,SPTA.TFOFAR	as	SEGMENT_FARE_REPORTING_AMT    
,case when SPTA.TFAORR='A' then 'AIR' when SPTA.TFAORR='R' then 'RAIL' else 'UNK' end  as	SEGMENT_TYPE         
,COALESCE(  NACOS.BK_CLASS_OF_SERVICE_TYPE_CD ,SPTA.TFCLST,'Z')  as 	BK_CLASS_OF_SERVICE_TYPE_CD  
,COALESCE(NICO.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE  ,trim(SPTA.TFFCRY) ,'UNK')	as	SEGMENT_ORIGIN_ISO_COUNTRY_CD 
,COALESCE(NICD.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE  ,trim(SPTA.TFTCRY) ,'UNK')	as	SEGMENT_DEST_ISO_COUNTRY_CD   
,COALESCE( NAFT.BK_FARE_TYPE_CD,SPTA.TFSFBT,'Z')   	as	FARE_TYPE_CD         
,COALESCE(SPTA.TFFBC	,'UNKNOWN') as 	FLIGHT_FARE_BASIS_CD      
,'I' AS ACTION_CODE
,'I' AS DML_TYPE
from 
(
SELECT 
TFSEQN,TFINV,TFIDTE,TFNPAS,TFACBR,TFMCID,TFFLNO,TFDDTE,TFTAPT,TFFAPT,TFCLST,
TFSFBT,TFAORR,TFCXR,TFCCDE,TFADTE,TFATME,TFDTME  ,
TFEXRT,TFFCDI,TFMILE       ,TFOFAR,TFFCRY,TFFBC  ,TFTCRY
 FROM $$STGDB.ST_POST_TRAVEL_AIR   
UNION ALL
SELECT  
TFSEQN,TFINV,TFIDTE,TFNPAS,TFACBR,TFMCID,TFFLNO,TFDDTE,TFTAPT,TFFAPT,TFCLST,
TFSFBT,TFAORR,TFCXR,TFCCDE,TFADTE,TFATME,TFDTME  ,
TFEXRT,TFFCDI,TFMILE       ,TFOFAR,TFFCRY,TFFBC  ,TFTCRY
 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_POST_TRAVEL_AIR
)  SPTA  
INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE NATI 
	ON (	NATI.BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_NUM    =  SPTA.TFINV 
		and NATI.BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_DT      = SPTA.TFIDTE
		and NATI.BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_PSNGR_NUM_INT = SPTA.TFNPAS
		and NATI.BK_AMX_TRVL_INV_ACTG_BRNCH_NUM = SPTA.TFACBR
		and NATI.BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_MACHINE_ID    = SPTA.TFMCID
		)  
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_POST_TRAVEL_AIR EPTA
       ON 
	    (SPTA.TFIDTE = EPTA.TFIDTE AND 
                     SPTA.TFMCID = EPTA.TFMCID AND 
                     SPTA.TFACBR = EPTA.TFACBR AND 
                     SPTA.TFINV =EPTA.TFINV AND 
                     SPTA.TFNPAS =EPTA.TFNPAS AND 
                     SPTA.TFSEQN = EPTA.TFSEQN )    
Left Outer Join  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_IATA_AIRPORT NIAD
	ON NIAD.BK_IATA_AIRPORT_CD= SPTA.TFTAPT  
Left Outer Join  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_IATA_AIRPORT NIAO
	ON NIAO.BK_IATA_AIRPORT_CD= SPTA.TFFAPT 
Left Outer Join $$FINLGLVWDB.N_IATA_AIRPORT NIA
	ON NIA.BK_IATA_AIRPORT_CD= EPTA.ORIGIN  
Left Outer Join $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_CLASS_OF_SERVICE_TYPE NACOS
	ON NACOS.BK_CLASS_OF_SERVICE_TYPE_CD =  SPTA.TFCLST
Left Outer JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TRAVEL_AMEX_ISO_COUNTRY    ETCISOCO
	ON  SPTA.TFFCRY = ETCISOCO. AMEX_COUNTRY_CODE     
Left Outer JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NICO
	on ETCISOCO.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE  =   NICO.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE 
Left Outer JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_TRAVEL_AMEX_ISO_COUNTRY    ETCISOCD
	ON  SPTA.TFTCRY = ETCISOCD. AMEX_COUNTRY_CODE     
Left Outer  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NICD
	on ETCISOCD.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE  =   NICD.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
Left Outer  Join  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_FARE_TYPE NAFT
	ON NAFT.BK_FARE_TYPE_CD =  SPTA.TFSFBT   	
Left Outer Join  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_RAIL_STATION NIRD
	ON NIRD.BK_RAIL_STATION_CD= SPTA.TFTAPT  
Left Outer Join  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_RAIL_STATION NIRO
	ON NIRO.BK_RAIL_STATION_CD= SPTA.TFFAPT 
Left Outer Join $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_RAIL_STATION NIR
	ON NIR.BK_RAIL_STATION_CD= EPTA.ORIGIN

SELECT
BATCH_ID,
TFIDTE,
TFMCID,
TFACBR,
TFINV,
TFNPAS,
TFSEQN,
TFFAPT,
TFTAPT,
TFCXR,
TFFLNO,
TFOFAR,
TFFBC,
TFCCDE,
TFDDTE,
TFDTME,
TFATME,
TFADTE,
TFCONC,
TFFCDI,
TFCCUR,
TFPNR,
TFTRNR,
TFMPAS,
TFCLST,
TFMILE,
TFEXRT,
TFAORR,
TFFCRY,
TFTCRY,
TFSFBT,
TFFIL2,
FK_TRAVEL0,
XPK_ROW0,
CREATE_DATETIME,
ACTION_CODE,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_POST_TRAVEL_AIR  SPTA
WHERE  
NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE NATI 
WHERE 	NATI.BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_NUM    =  SPTA.TFINV 
		and NATI.BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_DT      = SPTA.TFIDTE
		and NATI.BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_PSNGR_NUM_INT = SPTA.TFNPAS
		and NATI.BK_AMX_TRVL_INV_ACTG_BRNCH_NUM = SPTA.TFACBR
		and NATI.BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_MACHINE_ID    = SPTA.TFMCID
		)
